recommendations.title: README omits implemented PDL support and misdocuments accepted --type values
recommendations.description: Public documentation still states the CLI supports ADL, CDL, and WDL only, and documents `--type` as `adl|cdl|wdl`. The implementation and changelog clearly include PDL/pipeline support. This creates user-facing inconsistency for a public CLI surface.

recommendations.title: GlobalOptions.type does not include 'pdl' although the CLI supports it
recommendations.description: The shared options type advertises only `'adl' | 'cdl' | 'wdl'`, but runtime behavior and messages accept `pdl`. This is an internal contract mismatch that can confuse maintainers and consumers of typed command code.

recommendations.title: Command helpers are tightly coupled to process.exit()
recommendations.description: Deep command helpers terminate the process directly instead of returning status or throwing controlled errors. This reduces reuse and makes isolation/unit testing harder.

recommendations.title: Some exported utility functions appear unused in production code
recommendations.description: defaultOutputPath(), isFile(), and definitionName() are exported but not referenced by the package source. Unused exported surface area increases maintenance cost and can mislead future contributors.
